youtube_metadata.description: Terrifying nature facts, extreme animal adaptations, and wilderness survival trivia. #shorts #nature

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: deep sea angler fish black background teeth glow
fallback_facts.text_block: In the pitch-black deep ocean, the female anglerfish attracts prey using a <yellow>glowing bioluminescent lure</yellow> attached to her head. Males are tiny parasites that permanently fuse <red>to the female's body.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Anglerfish Mating

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: desert cactus heat sun dry sand dunes
fallback_facts.text_block: If you are lost in the desert, do not drink liquid from a cactus. Most cactus species contain <yellow>toxic alkaloids</yellow> that will cause vomiting, accelerating <red>lethal dehydration.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Desert Cactus Myth
